title: International Registered Students
content:
International Registered Students

English Language Proficiency

Okan Homepage

Academic

English Language Proficiency

MENU

All newly registered students are required to take the English Language Proficiency Exam at the beginning of the academic year, unless the students can certify that they have passed one of the national and/or international foreign language examinations at an accepted level. The students who pass the exam are registered directly into Freshman Year courses, those who have to register at English Language Preparatory Program.
